info.title: Track Systems API
info.description: API for Track Systems user management

get.description: List all active user types (fn_user_types mode 1).
Get user type by id (fn_user_types mode 2).
List all active tiers (fn_user_tiers mode 1).
Get tier by id (fn_user_tiers mode 2).
List all active groups (fn_user_groups mode 1).
Get group by id (fn_user_groups mode 2).
List all active users (fn_users mode 1 or 10 if location_id provided).
Filter users by location (fn_users mode 10).
Search users by term (fn_users mode 9).

post.description: Advanced search users with filters, pagination, and sorting.

get.description: Get user by id (fn_users mode 2).
Lookup identifier by scanned value (fn_user_identifiers mode 5).
Get identifier by id (fn_user_identifiers mode 2).
List identifiers for a user (fn_user_identifiers mode 1).
Recent failed attempts by logon id (fn_user_auth_logs mode 4).
Auth logs for a location (fn_user_auth_logs mode 5).
Single auth log row (fn_user_auth_logs mode 2).
Auth logs for user (fn_user_auth_logs mode 1).
Return locations visible to the authenticated staff (from JWT location scope).
Active areas for a location (fn_resource_areas p_mode=6) — Area dropdown when a location is selected.
List all active resource areas (mode 1).

post.description: Create a new resource area under a location (mode 3).

get.description: Filter active areas by location_id (mode 6).
Get a single area by area_id (mode 2).

put.description:
Update an existing area (mode 4).
Only fields provided are updated — omitted fields keep current DB value.

delete.description:
Deactivate an area (mode 5).
Blocked if active resources are assigned to this area.

post.description:
Decommission an area — sets status to decommissioned (mode 7).
Blocked if active resources are still assigned.
Recommission a decommissioned area back to active (mode 8).

post.summary: Resource types — all operations (p_mode in JSON body)
post.description:
Modes: 1=list, 2=get by id, 3=create, 4=update, 5=deactivate, 6=types dropdown, 7-9=category helpers.
Success: JSON array (modes 1-9 per fn_resource_types).
Create (mode 3): HTTP 201.
Errors: HTTP 400/500 with `{ "error": "<CODE>", "message": "<text>" }`.

get.description: List resources (mode 1).
Per-type card counts (mode 10).
Resources in an area (mode 8).
Resources available to link (mode 9).

get.summary: List resources available for category linking (mode 12)

post.description: Create resource with new linked resource (mode 5).

get.description: Get resource by id (mode 2).

List location holidays. Optionally filter by location_id.
- **location_id**: If provided, returns only holidays for that location.
Get a single location holiday by location_holiday_id.

put.description: Update an existing location holiday (partial update).

delete.description: Delete a location holiday by ID.

get.summary: Get location schedule overrides for a date range
get.description: Returns schedule overrides for the location in [start_date, end_date].

put.description: Upsert schedule overrides for the location. Each item in overrides is processed via DB mode 3.

delete.summary: Delete a location schedule override by id

requestBody.description: Send **application/json** with `logon_id` and `password`. Swagger **Authorize** (OAuth2 password) uses **application/x-www-form-urlencoded** with `username` (= logon_id) and `password`.

username.description: Kiosk logon id (same as JSON logon_id).

get.summary: [Legacy] Simple resource list by type (not for booking)
get.description: Legacy endpoint: returns rows from `fn_kiosk_resources` for browsing only. **Do not use for the reservation booking flow** — no slot, overlap, or `display_status`. For booking, call **GET /api/v1/kiosk/resources/availability** with date, time, and `booking_mode`.

200.description: Empty list when none; not slot-aware.

schema.title: Response Kiosk Resources Api V1 Kiosk Resources Get

get.summary: Operating hours for the kiosk location
get.description: Returns `open_time`, `close_time`, and `time_zone` for slot generation. Uses `public.fn_locations` mode 2. The path `location_id` must match the kiosk JWT `location_id`.

**Primary kiosk API for the booking grid.** Call `GET /api/v1/kiosk/resources/availability`
(instead of legacy `GET /api/v1/kiosk/resources`) whenever the user is picking a slot or
resource for a reservation.

**When to call this endpoint**

- After the user chooses a **resource type** (first paint of the booking list): use the
  selected type with **current local date and time** (or your product default slot).
- Again whenever **reservation_date** changes.
- Again whenever **start_time** changes.
- Again whenever **booking_mode** changes (`instant`, `scheduled`, or `specific`).

**Response contract**

- Returns **every** resource row produced by `fn_kiosk_resources_availability` for the type
  and location (slot overlap, linked resource, `availability_status`, `display_status`,
  `is_selectable`, and `reserved_reason` come from the database; do not drop rows in the
  API layer).
- Repeated slot fields (`booking_mode`, `reservation_date`, `start_time`, `duration_minutes`,
  `slot_start`, `slot_end`) are returned once in **`slot_context`**, not on each `data` item.
- `display_status` is intended for UI coloring only, using DB values as-is (commonly
  `available`, `reserved`, `offline`, `maintenance`).

`location_id` must match the location on the kiosk JWT.

parameters.name: resource_type_id

schema.description: Resource type the user selected on the booking flow.
schema.title: Resource Type Id

parameters.description: Resource type the user selected on the booking flow.

parameters.name: location_id

schema.description: Must equal `location_id` on the kiosk access token.
schema.title: Location Id

parameters.description: Must equal `location_id` on the kiosk access token.

parameters.name: reservation_date

schema.description: Calendar date for the reservation slot.
schema.title: Reservation Date

parameters.description: Calendar date for the reservation slot.

parameters.name: start_time

schema.description: Slot start time (local); re-fetch whenever this changes.
schema.title: Start Time

parameters.description: Slot start time (local); re-fetch whenever this changes.

parameters.name: booking_mode

schema.description: One of: instant | scheduled | specific (normalized with strip/lower). Re-fetch when this changes.
schema.title: Booking Mode

parameters.description: One of: instant | scheduled | specific (normalized with strip/lower). Re-fetch when this changes.

200.description: `slot_context` holds the shared slot; `data` is resource rows without repeated slot fields. `count` equals `len(data)`. Empty DB result: `data: []`, `slot_context` from query params.

AreaUpdate.title: AreaUpdate
AreaUpdate.description:
PUT /areas/{area_id} → fn_resource_areas mode 4
All fields optional — only provided fields are updated (COALESCE in DB).

display_status.title: Display Status
display_status.description: UI tone from the database (do not remap in the client layer beyond styling). Typical values: `available` (green), `reserved` (red), `offline` (grey), `maintenance` (grey).

AvailabilityResourceItem.title: AvailabilityResourceItem
AvailabilityResourceItem.description: One resource row from fn_kiosk_resources_availability (slot fields omitted).

BatchCreate.title: BatchCreate
BatchCreate.description: Batch metadata for fn_batch_visitors mode 3 (also used by batch routes).

ClosureType.title: ClosureType
ClosureType.description: Allowed closure types for location holidays.

KioskLocationOperatingHours.title: KioskLocationOperatingHours
KioskLocationOperatingHours.description: Fields the kiosk needs to build time-slot UI (from fn_locations mode 2).

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Whether the holiday is active (defaults to True)

LocationHolidayCreate.title: LocationHolidayCreate
LocationHolidayCreate.description: Schema for creating a location holiday.

LocationHolidayUpdate.title: LocationHolidayUpdate
LocationHolidayUpdate.description: Schema for updating a location holiday (partial update).

ResourceTypesPayload.title: ResourceTypesPayload
ResourceTypesPayload.description:
Body for POST /resource-types — matches public.fn_resource_types(p_data jsonb).
Send null for optional text fields when empty; do not send empty strings.

open_time.title: Open Time
open_time.description: Opening time (HH:mm); required when is_closed is false

close_time.title: Close Time
close_time.description: Closing time (HH:mm); required when is_closed is false

is_closed.title: Is Closed
is_closed.description: When true, open_time and close_time may be null

ScheduleOverrideEntry.title: ScheduleOverrideEntry
ScheduleOverrideEntry.description: Single override entry in a bulk upsert.

ScheduleOverridesBulkRequest.title: ScheduleOverridesBulkRequest
ScheduleOverridesBulkRequest.description: Body for PUT bulk schedule overrides.

SlotContext.title: SlotContext
SlotContext.description: Shared slot fields for an availability response (hoisted from each DB row).
